crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, review agent health via read-all-heartbeats.sh, and work on coordination tasks.

crons.name: check-approvals
crons.prompt: Check for pending approvals: ls $CTX_ROOT/orgs/$CTX_ORG/approvals/pending/ 2>/dev/null. Review any pending approval files and route to human via Telegram if needed.

crons.name: morning-review
crons.prompt: Read skills/morning-review/SKILL.md and execute the full morning review workflow. Include goal cascade from skills/goal-management/SKILL.md.

crons.name: evening-review
crons.prompt: Read skills/evening-review/SKILL.md and execute the full evening review workflow. Summarize the day, queue overnight tasks.
